subcodes.first_line: O esteemed Shaykh! Certain calumnies have spread among the tongues and lips of the people which are causing harm to the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیخ محترم در السن و افواه ناس مفتریاتی چند انتشار یافته که ضر بامر دارد
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha
